caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, headphones, and a green t-shirt with the text "ION NEVER DO SHIT" is speaking into a professional black microphone. He is positioned in a room that appears to be a studio or store, with a white mannequin wearing a white shirt and various framed photographs on the wall behind him. To the left and right of the screen, logos are visible, including one that says "THE" and another that reads "READY FOR IT". Across the sequence, the man remains in the same position, speaking and slightly shifting his facial expressions and head movement. He maintains a steady gaze forward as he talks, with the background remaining static, consisting of clothing racks and wall decor.
